commercial_suitability: Suitable for public screening demonstration with attribution; not a production site-level hazard assessment.

rendering_settings.enhanced: bicubic resize, premultiplied Gaussian blur 0.7 px, subtle blue edge contour

resolution: 3 arc-second source (~90 m); demo raster cropped to bbox
source: JRC/CEMS Global River Flood Hazard Maps, RP100 reclass tiles
source_attribution: JRC/CEMS Global River Flood Hazard Maps; Copernicus Emergency Management Service
